dataset: SecRepo and Loghub (auth.log and SSH logs)

pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py explicitly require this report name.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require this alert name.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require outputlookup/inputlookup to use this filename.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real-world log data downloaded from SecRepo and Loghub. It requires the agent to query the 'security_logs' index, generate a baseline report named 'Baseline_Known_User_IPs', use a lookup table named 'known_user_ips.csv', and create an alert named 'First_Time_Seen_Login_Alert'. All metadata claims correctly reflect the explicit requirements checked by the verifier scripts.
